faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Answers to frequently asked AI questions

items.question: What is LeftFlow?
items.answer: LeftFlow is an AI automation agency offering content generation, AI agents, workflow automation, and LLM development services. Our goal is to save you time and boost efficiency.

items.question: What problems can your AI solutions solve?
items.answer: We provide solutions across customer service automation, data analysis, content generation, business process optimization, and many more areas.

items.question: Is LeftFlow suitable for businesses of all sizes?
items.answer: Absolutely! We offer customized AI solutions for businesses of every size, from startups to enterprise organizations.

items.question: Why are RAG or LLM development valuable?
items.answer: RAG and LLM technologies transform your company data into intelligent assistants, improving customer experience and increasing operational efficiency.

items.question: How much does LeftFlow cost?
items.answer: We customize every project to fit your needs. During our free discovery call, we'll recommend a solution that works within your budget.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To empower businesses to work more efficiently, more intelligently, and faster with AI. To make technology accessible to everyone.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: To build a future where every business benefits from AI-powered automation and makes data-driven decisions.

items.title: Innovation First
items.description: We stay ahead of the latest AI technologies and deliver innovative solutions in every project. We build the future today.

items.title: Client Success = Our Success
items.description: We adopt our clients' goals as our own. Their growth is our motivation.

items.title: Continuous Learning
items.description: Technology evolves every day, and so do we. Our team stays among the best by constantly upgrading their skills.

items.title: Transparency
items.description: We communicate openly, honestly, and clearly with our partners. Full transparency at every step.

items.title: Remote-First, Global Mindset
items.description: Based in Rotterdam and Istanbul, our team thinks globally while delivering local solutions. Our remote-first culture brings together the best talent.
